Friend, We are only $2,765 from where we need to be to hit our goal before tonight's FEC deadline. This movement is powered by people like you and together we are taking a stand to fight for the well being of our communities instead of big corporate donors. With our way of life and daily routines upended, I understand that making a political contribution may be far from your top concern. But the reality is, if we don't raise the resources we need, we could lose the election. So please, consider giving what you can. [We wouldn't ask if it weren't urgent: Can Doyle count on you to make one of the donations we need to get back on track? Chip in today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1QA/ni0YAA/t.30k/35S-QkluQXa9fWBwFd3sQA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v05-2Fi7D9J-2Fqhj-2F46hEBctJ7P-2FqeWsVA6iVYTz9NXF04yBMZQPVgEN-2Fkj3wTlX4eMmou7Ay8BJNVw7-2BMaYkAYqmnRt-2BQ-2Bd8zXLphBd796gWTBGNISTh635LWFyihawd9Sut3t1SSOpJFEJx4FbA-2FuRvAancZnqvJMr1YSAZ6JAnZ7nrOsKHb8XYzw3xpCyYuWIX7TIzjLz7-2FVjaJDdDGAJ9a8g2yR6B8Aq6MHlSVQPxR-2Fw-3D/QfXy)

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Last chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d9/7f51f7bc/4ce53593/4ef1c42f/3771903002/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, we've only got hours left before our first end-of-quarter deadline of the runoff, and we are so close to hitting our $75,000 goal. Being unable to have in-person events has made this a challenge, but I know this team will come through tonight.

This is our last message before midnight, so I wanted to personally reach out. Here's a link for you to donate now, if you're able, to make sure your donation is counted toward our $75,000 goal:

**[https://www.mjfortexas.com/donate/Peter](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d9/7f51f7bc/4ce53593/4ef1c42e/3771903002/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200331.3nd__1148__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thank you for being part of this team.

\-- MJ
**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d9/7f51f7bc/4ce53593/4ef1c42e/3771903002/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200331.3nd__1148__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d9/7f51f7bc/4ce53593/4ef1c42d/3771903002/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1148&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903d9/7f51f7bc/4ce53593/4ef1c42c/3771903002/VEsD/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

Dear Peter,
I'm Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

I am asking tonight for your help. I have less than four hours to meet my goal, and I need** [_YOUR help urgently_](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i10MUoGswpNxmng&b=E6.qSQIreZbTMQAsWizZCA) because President Trump needs our help!**

**While the Coronavirus crisis was unfolding, Pelosi was focused on her act of political revenge, the impeachment sham. Her ploy failed, but if she keeps control of Congress, she will try again. **

_My opponent, Democrat G.K. Butterfield said they will try impeachment again. We cannot let them have control of Congress!_

The deadline is tonight at midnight! **I needed to raise $50,000 to keep pace with my radical Dem opponent. I have only $1,230 to go but mere hours remaining.**

[If you have not yet given, or you gave previously, will you give right now? I ask you to contribute $5, $10, $15 or match what you did before or double what you did before.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i10MUoGswpNxmng&b=E6.qSQIreZbTMQAsWizZCA)

Whatever it takes to meet this goal so that when obstructionist Butterfield sees my report, he knows the time to pay for his impeachment vote has come.

I am urgently in danger of not raising enough, and [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i10MUoGswpNxmng&b=E6.qSQIreZbTMQAsWizZCA). I appreciate you and thank you.

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i10MUoGswpNxmng&b=E6.qSQIreZbTMQAsWizZCA)

Sandy Smith

Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom

body:
---
| | I can hardly believe my eyes. Just yesterday -- I told you I was in danger of missing my first end-of-quarter goal of the election year. [**But since generous donors unlocked the match -- you've come to my defense in a historic way!**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200331_em_fr_b3_lujan_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") [_**I now only need 1 more gift from 18326 before midnight to MEET tonight's critical goal, WIN this Senate race, and DEFEAT McConnell's Senate. It would mean so much to me if you were the one to push me over the top. (Your generous gift will be matched for these final 3 hours) >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200331_em_fr_b3_lujan_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") I mean this with absolute certainty: This election is our once-in-a-lifetime shot to unseat Mitch McConnell's Senate. I'm humbly asking one last time before the crucial deadline hits in 3 hours: **[Will you rush $10 to ensure I come out of tonight's end-of-quarter deadline with an unbeatable foundation for victory? (It will be MATCHED)](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200331_em_fr_b3_lujan_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")** | | ****[**MATCH your $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200331_em_fr_b3_lujan_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")****

Ben Ray

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b612/18e32a7f/4f207c86/7b221fdd/2367389415/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b612/18e32a7f/4f207c86/7b221fd2/2367389415/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b612/18e32a7f/4f207c86/7b221fd3/2367389415/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b612/18e32a7f/4f207c86/7b221fd0/2367389415/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b612/18e32a7f/4f207c86/7b221fd1/2367389415/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails")

If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand.
Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b612/18e32a7f/4f207c86/7b221fd6/2367389415/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

clean_body: | | I can hardly believe my eyes. Just yesterday -- I told you I was in danger of missing my first end-of-quarter goal of the election year. "" "" I mean this with absolute certainty: This election is our once-in-a-lifetime shot to unseat Mitch McConnell's Senate. I'm humbly asking one last time before the crucial deadline hits in 3 hours: "" | | ** "" "" "" "" "" I can't thank you enough for your trust and support, Ben Ray "" "" "" Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? ""** We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, "" If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request. People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

| | _The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

The NRCC just launched a despicable attack ad against Christy.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Is In It Together
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-jj/)
# March 31, 2020
## **Tennesseans Are In It Together**
#TeamHagerty is continuing to do everything we can to support communities across Tennessee. One of the best ways to do that, while following social distancing guidelines, is taking advantage of pick up and delivery options at local restaurants and stores. Follow #TeamHagerty [**HERE**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-r/) to see how we're supporting local economies throughout Tennessee and send us your ideas for how to keep our communities strong at **[TNTogether@teamhagerty.com](mailto:TNTogether@teamhagerty.com) **To check out our list of resources for ways to support your community, click **[HERE](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-y/)** See more content like this **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-j/)** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-t/) **ICYMI: Read Bill's Op-Ed in Breitbart** The impact of coronavirus can be seen throughout Tennessee and the world, yet China continues to work overtime to conceal the truth and deflect any and all blame for the deadly disease. In Bill's latest editorial, he calls for China to be held accountable and commits to continue to push back against China's misinformation campaign alongside President Trump. To read the full Op-Ed in Breitbart News, click **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-i/)**
## **Be a Part of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-d/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-h/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-k/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-u/) **Bill Hagerty Files Petition with Over 2,500 Signatures from All 95 Counties**[Tennessean:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-m/)** Heed advice of health professionals and first responders on front lines of coronavirus fight**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-c/) **Bill Hagerty Says We Must Hold China Accountable for Coronavirus**[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-q/)** Tennessee Senate Candidate Amb. Bill Hagerty: "The Chinese Have Got To Be Held Accountable"**[Chattanoogan:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-a/) **Hagerty: End Human Trafficking, Support Death Penalty For Traffickers - And Response
## **What They're Saying...**
> _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-f/) _" After looking Bill in the eye, I can fully vouch for the fact that he is a pro-life, Second Amendment custodian in full support of our president's agenda. Without hesitation, I intend to support and vote for him and humbly ask that you do as well."_
> _[-](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-z/)_[ Jeff Broyles](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty will work with President Trump, just as he did while Ambassador to Japan, to protect our farmers and make sure that they are treated fairly when it comes to trade. He has my support to be Tennessee's next Senator."_
> [-Mayor Rick Graham](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" Bill Hagerty is running for the United States Senate to combat the radical socialists and their agenda. I know Bill will stand with President Donald Trump to protect my conservative values and the conservative values of so many Tennesseans across the state."_
> [-Michael Tedder](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" That's why it's very important that we send a senator to Washington, D.C., who understands how dangerous this is and who will stop the Democrats' extremely liberal agenda. I believe that representative is Bill Hagerty, a fiscal conservative running for the United States Senate who is endorsed by President Trump."_
> [-Kenneth Eaton](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" I am supporting Bill Hagerty for Senate because he will continue fighting for family-owned farms, like mine, to ensure we have the resources necessary to compete on a global scale and win."_
> [-Charlotte Kelley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-yh/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-yk/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-yu/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-jl/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-jr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-jy/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215
[ Share ](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-fb-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-jt/)
[ Tweet ](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-tw-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-ji/)
[ Forward ](https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-nkillid-l-jd)
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-nkillid-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-jh) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-u-nkillid-fuutjhhtj-jk/)

name: Dean Browning
subject: Application for Mail-In Ballot 🇺🇸
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy while our nation continues to deal with the coronavirus, also known as COVID-19. Considering everything that is happening, it is easy to lose sight of the upcoming elections. Currently, Pennsylvania has a Primary Election scheduled to take place in just five (5) weeks on Tuesday, April 28th. However, to add to the uncertainty of the times, there is a strong likelihood that the Primary Election will be postponed to a later date. It is reported that Tuesday, June 2nd could be the alternative election day, but no official date is set yet. However, regardless of when the Primary Election is held, Pennsylvania voters now have the option of casting their ballot by mail. If you have any concern about you or anyone in your family going to your polling place, then I would strongly encourage you to vote by mail. The process is easy and straightforward. Just click the button below to print out an application.
[Click here to print the application! ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J1aQKf3FyawIOi4_Q4z3C60rn4dOlY9Ci59USLCncFrPSEkhrDmjB25U1OB_NQkHWgQQoVWVS77WQzD_nVPiNEM3PgTYNsxhVm35rt4iTGA5qd2jL6RgAqfAUeT-Qi4mgP10IEZXHI6JNEhbUQBcYQ1GOdpEbTfncNKL6Y0OI1DmXA2Du0YipQtCBGoSILA8M3UynDMKbkdq1UmEeWAzGz9MYx7GEYYX&c=DvQ7XkMDMzvcJyvrdKlx27Ul3TlQTsLdr9A-VMreaWDZROoV_1zb-w==&ch=jwF5kSx5DZBSms30vgv2kyHN34vr2Nto87QWjdh5CzETd4ijgFbeLA==)
Once the application is completed, you will need to mail or deliver it to the Voter Registration office for your respective county.
Here is the list of addresses for each county in the PA-7th Congressional District as follows:
Lehigh County Voter Registration 17 S. 7th Street Allentown, PA 18101-2401 Monroe County Voter Registration One Quaker Plaza, Rm 105 Stroudsburg, PA 18360 Northampton County Voter Registration 670 Wolf Avenue Easton, PA 18042 If you have any questions about this process, please immediately call me at 484-550-6550 or go to [www.votepa.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J1aQKf3FyawIOi4_Q4z3C60rn4dOlY9Ci59USLCncFrPSEkhrDmjB25U1OB_NQkHd0HXGgpLJUp7832xwliylEz2pQVqo3GWslXDS1EZ2NdF9oE8ViwvePM8shkwQIZEwlwf1VWS6j4=&c=DvQ7XkMDMzvcJyvrdKlx27Ul3TlQTsLdr9A-VMreaWDZROoV_1zb-w==&ch=jwF5kSx5DZBSms30vgv2kyHN34vr2Nto87QWjdh5CzETd4ijgFbeLA==). Please remember to exercise your right to vote so your voice can be heard in the upcoming Primary Election. I would greatly appreciate your support, and with your help, we can return conservative grassroots representation in our nation's capital! I pray that Almighty God guides us through the current crisis and that He keeps you and your family safe and healthy.
For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J1aQKf3FyawIOi4_Q4z3C60rn4dOlY9Ci59USLCncFrPSEkhrDmjB25U1OB_NQkHF_91sUyBVuhheThk6ach4jK_D1kwmj9cUumTLEPRW2lWl6dfr_ZreCHTUUMANdVRv0HeX17wmyGxISZ7BYTCeH1wYK_A4pO9UrWxdtqFlOhL-4p9HkKDmA==&c=DvQ7XkMDMzvcJyvrdKlx27Ul3TlQTsLdr9A-VMreaWDZROoV_1zb-w==&ch=jwF5kSx5DZBSms30vgv2kyHN34vr2Nto87QWjdh5CzETd4ijgFbeLA==)

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16769035/178435066/-779694663?refcode=em040120-header&refcode2=1c229606-4574-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzIyOTYwNi00NTc0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ijYH5JXtE73OdcJ5Lu8UkDmF_Iu32BMTktThy3OeXS8=) **** | | Friend, I want to say thank you from the bottom of my heart.

Thanks to an unprecedented grassroots effort to kick off this historic election year, we are in the strongest position since beginning this campaign to make history in Georgia, replace David Perdue, and take back the Senate majority from Mitch McConnell.

There’s so much to cover from the past three months. **You’ve donated more than $2 million to-date, with March alone accounting for nearly $300,000 raised in our fight to defeat David Perdue, our single greatest month of fundraising of this election.**

**Our campaign also stands out by receiving the endorsements of Democracy for America and the National Organization for Women’s Political Action Committee** , along with civil rights leaders like Andrew Young, Hank Aaron, Joe Beasley, and many others across Georgia whose advocacy has spanned from the Civil Rights Movement of the 1950s and 1960s to today.

As our state and country grapple with the coronavirus pandemic, I am more resolved than ever to use my experience as a former two-term mayor, public safety director, and head of Homeland Security in Columbus to effect meaningful reforms in the United States Senate to keep our country safe — starting with ending the corruption of our current Republican representation.

That starts with strengthening the Affordable Care Act to reform a sabotaged healthcare system. The federal government must take responsibility for expanding Medicaid to over 500,000 Georgians, reopening the more than half dozen rural hospitals that have closed in our state, and driving down the cost of premiums, deductibles, and co-payments by expanding Medicare to people 55 and up and creating a public option while confronting the greed and price gouging of the pharmaceutical industry.

I’m also fighting to raise the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour, so that frontline workers risking their lives and livelihoods to keep our communities running during this pandemic — and thereafter — are able to make ends meet with **one** good-paying job, not two or three, and ensuring that workers everywhere have the right to collectively bargain and form a union.

Friends, we are all in this together. This fight isn’t over — it’s only just begun. Thank you for your support. Despite these uncertain times, we’re going to continue pressing on to make the fundamental changes our country so desperately needs. In fact, it’s more important now than ever.

Yours truly,
Teresa

_P.S. Now that you’ve seen our big news, I’d love to chat with you directly. I’m holding a virtual public town hall tonight at 7:00 p.m. to answer your questions and tell you more about how we’re going to send Perdue packing in November.**[Click here to RSVP>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16769036/178435067/-1729585073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzIyOTYwNi00NTc0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ijYH5JXtE73OdcJ5Lu8UkDmF_Iu32BMTktThy3OeXS8=&emci=1b229606-4574-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=1c229606-4574-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=463701)**_
********

clean_body: | | | | = ** | | Friend, I want to say thank you from the bottom of my heart. Thanks to an unprecedented grassroots effort to kick off this historic election year, we are in the strongest position since beginning this campaign to make history in Georgia, replace David Perdue, and take back the Senate majority from Mitch McConnell. There’s so much to cover from the past three months. You’ve donated more than $2 million to-date, with March alone accounting for nearly $300,000 raised in our fight to defeat David Perdue, our single greatest month of fundraising of this election. Our campaign also stands out by receiving the endorsements of Democracy for America and the National Organization for Women’s Political Action Committee , along with civil rights leaders like Andrew Young, Hank Aaron, Joe Beasley, and many others across Georgia whose advocacy has spanned from the Civil Rights Movement of the 1950s and 1960s to today. As our state and country grapple with the coronavirus pandemic, I am more resolved than ever to use my experience as a former two-term mayor, public safety director, and head of Homeland Security in Columbus to effect meaningful reforms in the United States Senate to keep our country safe — starting with ending the corruption of our current Republican representation. That starts with strengthening the Affordable Care Act to reform a sabotaged healthcare system. The federal government must take responsibility for expanding Medicaid to over 500,000 Georgians, reopening the more than half dozen rural hospitals that have closed in our state, and driving down the cost of premiums, deductibles, and co-payments by expanding Medicare to people 55 and up and creating a public option while confronting the greed and price gouging of the pharmaceutical industry. I’m also fighting to raise the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour, so that frontline workers risking their lives and livelihoods to keep our communities running during this pandemic — and thereafter — are able to make ends meet with one good-paying job, not two or three, and ensuring that workers everywhere have the right to collectively bargain and form a union. Friends, we are all in this together. This fight isn’t over — it’s only just begun. Thank you for your support. Despite these uncertain times, we’re going to continue pressing on to make the fundamental changes our country so desperately needs. In fact, it’s more important now than ever. Yours truly, Teresa P.S. Now that you’ve seen our big news, I’d love to chat with you directly. I’m holding a virtual public town hall tonight at 7:00 p.m. to answer your questions and tell you more about how we’re going to send Perdue packing in November. PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Team USA: 50 Companies Join Trump's War on Coronavirus
body:
"Some 50 major American firms have joined the national war on the coronavirus, many volunteering to shift their focus and even assembly lines..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0f2ba0d24f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Team USA: 50 Companies Join Trump's War on Coronavirus**

“Some 50 major American firms have joined the national war on the coronavirus, many volunteering to shift their focus and even assembly lines to deliver needed supplies to doctors, hospitals, first responders and others on the front lines,” Paul Bedard reports for the _Washington Examiner_.

“Most said that they answered President Trump’s call for help,” Bedard writes. The companies that have enlisted include Facebook, Anheuser-Busch, Ford, Fiat Chrysler, and many others. “Other national and local groups have also brought in corporate partners to help find masks, gowns, and other personal protective equipment.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ad71f0769&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “At the president’s direction, HUD suspended foreclosures and evictions for all 8.5 million single-family homeowners with mortgages and reserve mortgages insured under the Federal Housing Administration for 60 days,” Housing and Urban Development Secretary Dr. Ben Carson writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=62455444b6&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “White House coronavirus task force member Dr. Deborah Birx said the slow coronavirus response from global governments came because China’s public data on the virus was inaccurate.” Dr. Birx said the medical community was led to believe that China’s outbreak was smaller. Read more from Anders Hagstrom in [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ad31b3fc99&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| CNN pundits “bashed President Donald Trump for saying on March 4 that the death rate of the novel coronavirus is likely much lower than data indicates, but the network published a report Monday evening that backs up the president’s previous statement,” Shelby Talcott reports for [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c105712d71&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e4ced670af&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05a229659d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e3baf1cb63)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress
body:
I’m truly proud to have you on my side and I wanted to thank you for your
contributions this month.
<>
Peter, I am happy to report our first end of quarter deadline of the year has
been a tremendous success.

And it’s all because of supporters like you.

In this trying time, we’ve had to put an end to most of our campaign events
and I don’t get the chance to meet with as many New Yorkers - face to face - as
I would like. But your continued support keeps us going. It keeps our campaign
alive, online, and fighting the politics as usual that we need to shake back up
in Washington.

I’m truly proud to have you on my side and I wanted to thank you for your
contributions this month.

It means a lot.

I look forward to continuing the fight for our values against the Washington
elitists like Anthony Brindisi.

-Claudia

Paid for by Claudia for Congress

PO Box 244 Clinton, NY 13323

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

clean_body: I’m truly proud to have you on my side and I wanted to thank you for your contributions this month. <> Peter, I am happy to report our first end of quarter deadline of the year has been a tremendous success. And it’s all because of supporters like you. In this trying time, we’ve had to put an end to most of our campaign events and I don’t get the chance to meet with as many New Yorkers - face to face - as I would like. But your continued support keeps us going. It keeps our campaign alive, online, and fighting the politics as usual that we need to shake back up in Washington. I’m truly proud to have you on my side and I wanted to thank you for your contributions this month. It means a lot. I look forward to continuing the fight for our values against the Washington elitists like Anthony Brindisi. -Claudia Paid for by Claudia for Congress PO Box 244 Clinton, NY 13323

name: Molly Keenan
subject: You can absolutely make a difference, even from home
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Here's how you can help
| **Team Inslee** Friend, If you're like me, right now you might feel a bit paralyzed -- by fear, by uncertainty and unknowns. We know people need help, but we're not sure how, or if, we can do anything from home. I have good news: _You absolutely can make an incredible difference -- in fact, you probably already are._**First, staying home is saving lives.** No matter where you live, you are actively helping by staying home as much as you possibly can. I know it can feel like you're doing nothing, but I promise you're doing so, so much by simply staying home. **Second, you can support organizations throughout the country working to support families who are food insecure at this critical time.**[Feeding America](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8552?t=3&akid=8046%2E868730%2EL12Kmy), [Meals on Wheels](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8553?t=4&akid=8046%2E868730%2EL12Kmy), and [No Kid Hungry](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8554?t=5&akid=8046%2E868730%2EL12Kmy) are just three of the hundreds of organizations stepping up to do phenomenal work all over the country, but if you've been looking for a place to donate, I can't recommend them highly enough. Thank you for all that you are already doing, including staying home. That alone is an incredible gift to this country and to your community -- and I know how much of a sacrifice it is. Take care of each other, stay home, and stay safe. Thanks, Molly Molly Keenan
Campaign Manager
Inslee for Washington
---

name: Conservative Alert from Karl Rove
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Senate Leadership Fund
body:
If this past weeks have told us anything, it's that Democrats can't be trusted to lead our government right now. Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer's actions on the coronavirus relief bill were shameful and wrong.
Friend,

If this past weeks have told us anything, it's that Democrats can't be trusted to lead our government right now. **Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer 's actions on the coronavirus relief bill were shameful and wrong.**
They politicized the coronavirus crisis and tried sneaking in the Green New Deal and a whole bunch of other bad ideas into the bill. They demanded a $25 million giveaway to the Kennedy Center be included in the bill and then the DC opera house fired all its musicians. This should all act as a giant warning to the entire country -- the Democrat Left can't be trusted.
Now, National Democrats are aiming a scary amount of money and energy at Iowa in an attempt to unseat Joni Ernst and takeover the majority in the Senate.
**Losing Joni in the Senate and our GOP Majority would be terrible, Friend.** Joni Ernst has been a courageous leader in the fight against the radical Left's attempts at enacting their Socialist agenda. name: My Faith Votes
subject: Please read this
body:
| | Get common-sense, daily news in your inbox
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=TIi5AeGEPxdM94RMBE-ucoFf7u2bl0dU8jEKjkN7YVYrNYeQl_6rJctnZveWAzBg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200401com01&n=1)
| Peter, As we've seen recently with coverage of the coronavirus, the mainstream media will stop at nothing to advance its agenda. They are actively trying to divide instead of unite us in such a critical time. All while American values, common sense, and faith are being cast aside. As a result we’re losing the ability to have reasoned conversations about what really matters. So now what? **The good news is there’s a**[new daily news email](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=TIi5AeGEPxdM94RMBE-ucoFf7u2bl0dU8jEKjkN7YVYrNYeQl_6rJctnZveWAzBg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200401com01&n=2)**for people who want to stay informed, who value civil discussion, and who love the truth.** It's called "Up First," and it's from the news network The First, a network dedicated to true ideas, fresh voices, and the American values that this country was founded on. Watch our new ad launch to learn about what inspired me to run, and what I’ll fight for in Washington.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/6338f1ef6f3f1b96/324af10b7fa6a93ec3d6b838967d376c/33363) Fellow Hoosier, With the COVID-19 protocols in place, traditional campaign events have been put on hold. While we follow all necessary protocols, including social distancing, designed to help slow the spread of the coronavirus, we are using virtual methods to connect with you. Our online efforts are more important than ever. On Thursday, we launch our new ad where I explain what inspired me to run for Congress, and what I’ll work for in Washington. I’m writing to ask you to tune into Facebook on Thursday at 7:00 p.m. to watch with us as we debut this ad. **[Tap or click here to join our Watch Party to premiere our new ad on Facebook!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/6338f1ef6f3f1b96/88fc4f393857ae6fc3d6b838967d376c/33363)** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/6338f1ef6f3f1b96/b80667199e147fa6c3d6b838967d376c/33363) As a pediatric doctor, the children I’ve worked with have taught me so much – courage, compassion, truth, and decency. They are all things that are missing in Washington, and I want to change that. **[Please join us on Thursday at 7 p.m. to watch the ad and help share my message](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/6338f1ef6f3f1b96/86968bae90bcae4bc3d6b838967d376c/33363).** I am grateful beyond words for your support in this race. -Dr. Chuck [ **Join Our Watch Party >>>** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/6338f1ef6f3f1b96/1220e701a7bff9e4c3d6b838967d376c/33363) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/6338f1ef6f3f1b96/feb74538050e5121c3d6b838967d376c/33363) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/6338f1ef6f3f1b96/3a1bc95089462dfec3d6b838967d376c/33363)

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: more than I can express
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cmN15UHzmio3xpqxd902F0pQb04RaaQuZLAXy6a9M0g=/-g3anjXMvillCHaL1Ib9nnXYGgqlt7GffypggHF2IwY=)
---
Team,

I just received an update from my staff on the outpouring of support we have recently received to keep our campaign going after we shifted our focus to public health crisis response, and I'm completely overwhelmed with gratitude.

I know the last couple weeks haven't been easy. Between concerns for the well-being of you and your loved ones, new economic strains, and just a general feeling of anxiety -- so many are feeling overwhelmed and stretched to their limits.

When my team let me know about the generosity of our supporters during a crisis, I immediately wanted to reach out and express my appreciation to you, friend.

In these most uncertain of times, I am even more committed to making a change in our leadership for TX-22 and our nation. We must win this fall and we will, together.

Thank you again,
Sri

PS: Our campaign is still working to help families and frontline responders in TX-22! Please visit our information center to learn more: [**https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cmN15UHzmio3xpqxd902F0pQb04RaaQuZLAXy6a9M0g=/-g3anjXMvillCHaL1Ib9nnXYGgqlt7GffypggHF2IwY=)
**STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT** **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cmN15UHzmio3xpqxd902F0pQb04RaaQuZLAXy6a9M0g=/ckpQXAYeN-C8BGsZHU0Rsr4OssYzEujiKtSPc7QgTgA=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/cmN15UHzmio3xpqxd902F0pQb04RaaQuZLAXy6a9M0g=/oAQ5mDY0M0_8Xb-RkEmx78cSGA9SI_X0JOFaqg7KHBs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/cmN15UHzmio3xpqxd902F0pQb04RaaQuZLAXy6a9M0g=/pYRJKUIzGrZ8emHROyN2x3RjAXsFEdVARhUT4gZYt4o=)** | Paid for by Sri for Congress.

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: What I've been doing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
For so many of us, the past couple of weeks have been fretful and anxiety-ridden.
**Even though the unprecedented nature of this health crisis can feel overwhelming, I want to assure you that, no matter what, I am doing my best to keep CA-38 safe.**
Here are some of the ways I'm doing my part, along with helpful links for accurate coronavirus-related information:
* I co-authored legislation included in the _Families First Coronavirus Response Act_ , which will provide free coronavirus testing for uninsured patients.

* Leading a bipartisan group in Congress, I urged our Agriculture Secretary to ease restrictions on which foods qualify for the WIC food assistance program. WIC-approved foods help low-income pregnant women, babies, and children get the nutrition they need.

* I voted in favor of the _Coronavirus Aid, Relief, and Economic Security (CARES) Act_ , which will help support hospitals, working families, small businesses, and students.

* Last week, I held a telephone town hall, fielding questions about COVID-19 from constituents across CA-38. And on Friday, April 3, I will be holding another telephone town hall, specifically for small businesses.

* I am supporting non-profits which help folks being impacted by the economic side effects of coronavirus. Learn more about the [Restaurant Workers Community Foundation](https://act.myngp.com/el/IeitGohgiE3t1KmCKAiaDFKGUavdSioBBg1HIxDhnt4=/avRx1j_SRJeqDM0BHtT7Ob7Z8N-YMZbfGWOpxSBqF5Q=?refcode=X_033120_CoronavirusUpdate_C) and the [National Domestic Workers Alliance](https://act.myngp.com/el/IeitGohgiE3t1KmCKAiaDFKGUavdSioBBg1HIxDhnt4=/E2d64riZIx9U-vrT-Gq7NmLYtQIQnx_T29aH_5oLV9s=?refcode=X_033120_CoronavirusUpdate_C)['s](https://act.myngp.com/el/IeitGohgiE3t1KmCKAiaDFKGUavdSioBBg1HIxDhnt4=/K-ZjZGh4m8U11WSui_IeRuBWsgh5RUZn_cWP2DNXaHo=?refcode=X_033120_CoronavirusUpdate_C) charitable organizations.

**Are you a California resident with a question relating to COVID-19? **
Find reliable, up-to-date information on everything from testing and treatment, to unemployment benefits, to paid family leave, and information for small businesses at [covid19.ca.gov/](https://act.myngp.com/el/IeitGohgiE3t1KmCKAiaDFKGUavdSioBBg1HIxDhnt4=/SqfSmKncWOO2m3_C2TZlRbwMvaz4HN2vDNfvbmKb1bs=).

You can find information specific to LA County at [publichealth.lacounty.gov/](https://act.myngp.com/el/IeitGohgiE3t1KmCKAiaDFKGUavdSioBBg1HIxDhnt4=/81u6r1qvNpwGK6G0QbusrNDwpYIn6B5l5rBiqsKqC3o=).

And, finally, if you're able -- and _only_ if you're able -- **[will you consider making a contribution to my re-election campaign?](https://act.myngp.com/el/IeitGohgiE3t1KmCKAiaDFKGUavdSioBBg1HIxDhnt4=/MlZtrm_x0iTcni5l2DPzGMbvOmTXSZeQYhJPVB7xNeY=?refcode=X_040120_CoronavirusUpdate_C)** I fight hard for the folks of CA-38. **[Help keep me in Congress through November and beyond>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/IeitGohgiE3t1KmCKAiaDFKGUavdSioBBg1HIxDhnt4=/MlZtrm_x0iTcni5l2DPzGMbvOmTXSZeQYhJPVB7xNeY=?refcode=X_040120_CoronavirusUpdate_C)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/IeitGohgiE3t1KmCKAiaDFKGUavdSioBBg1HIxDhnt4=/BejEE-y7ZFtWu5PizGOUhjre5NcwWzwHqrDSZfM8bOQ=?refcode=X_040120_CoronavirusUpdate_C)
Thank you and stay well,
\-- _Linda S anchez_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/IeitGohgiE3t1KmCKAiaDFKGUavdSioBBg1HIxDhnt4=/q9khzDMKo5qmrM3PIaTH8Kr7B5MKTWZsqqPdGJF-neA=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/IeitGohgiE3t1KmCKAiaDFKGUavdSioBBg1HIxDhnt4=/pFLethHWEb1KVSQFkeSrBjt1uoazwvvucvGSbZ3fWTg=)
**For more information about COVID-19, including official updates, please visit _[https://www.cdc.gov/](https://act.myngp.com/el/IeitGohgiE3t1KmCKAiaDFKGUavdSioBBg1HIxDhnt4=/w4UNdImWCZ-y6IKrASfmWbGx2mDM9uVPwS5YWi67UpY=)_**

Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
---

Washington DC 20003 United States

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Our new video:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390152/55b66746/2389738f/80e0f2a/3319023138/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Hey, This past month has been difficult for all of us. We are worried. We are anxious. We're not sure what the next few days or weeks or months will look like. But this community has been an incredible source of comfort. Staying connected has given us faith that we'll get through this - together. Today we released a new video recapping the conversations Joe has had with all of you over the past month. **Please take a moment to watch and share:** [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390152/55b66746/2389738f/80e0f34/3319023138/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy/status/1245358163022483457?s=21") Since mid-March, Joe has appeared live on social media 28 times! That includes eight broadcasts that aired across Twitter, Facebook, and Youtube simultaneously. He's "sat down" with ER doctors, economists, famous chefs, medical experts, and so many more. We've had millions -- yes, _millions_ -- of folks join us for these conversations. People coming together, even when we're far apart. We hope you'll continue to be a part of it. **Take a moment to join this community and follow Joe:** [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390152/55b66746/2389738f/80e0f36/3319023138/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390152/55b66746/2389738f/80e0f30/3319023138/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy") He'll be live again with the latest updates real soon. Tune in, ask questions, and share with your friends. We're in this together. We'll get through it, together. \- Team Kennedy |
---|---|---

---|---

This is **NOT** the news we were hoping to wake up to this morning, Friend.
In the past 24 hours: yesterday, two anti-Trump groups sealed the deal to raise **$127 MILLION** to take down President Trump... _and last night, we fell short of our End of Quarter deadline by just 201 contributions._
This one-two punch just severely hurt our chances in 2020. That's why we just took an unprecedented step to help the President: we have officially extended our fundraising deadline for **ONE FINAL DAY.**

name: Charles Booker
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Last night, against the odds, we hit our FEC end-of-quarter fundraising goal. This was no small feat and I am blown away by how many of you stepped up to help out.
#
From the bottom of my heart: thank you.
Last night, against the odds, we hit our FEC end-of-quarter fundraising goal. **This was no small feat and I am blown away by the power of this movement. **
Especially in these challenging times, we understand that not everyone is in the position to give. We also know it’s tempting to feel hopeless about our future.
**But then last night, this movement chose hope.** A record number of supporters chipped in to help push us over the edge and fund our fight to create a new kind of politics that works for all of us. It was an inspiring ending to the first quarter of our campaign, and I feel more energized than ever to fight for the change Kentuckians deserve.
Whether you chipped in $5, made a couple of phone calls, or just signed up to be on our email list — please know your support means the world to me. Together, we’re showing our opponents and the establishment how strong grassroots donors can be, and how wrong they are to doubt us.
**It’s never been more clear that we are the people to beat Mitch McConnell.**
This is our time to fight, to stand, to believe, to lock arms, and to say that we matter. This is about our future. This is about US.
I can’t wait to see what we accomplish next.
Talk to you soon,
Charles

** **

name: John Philip Sousa IV
subject: ⏰ Payment is DUE...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, I know things are difficult right now, so... * |
Dear Peter, I just wanted to put the urgent email below back at the top of your inbox. As you may know, our highly-effective minority voter outreach radio ads have been airing in key minority markets in crucial swing states **since August** , _including our newest ads in Michigan supporting veteran John James for U.S. Senate_. **Peter, if we're going to win this election, then it's absolutely crucial we stay**ON THE AIR** all the way up through Election Day...** **...and the April payment is NOW DUE...** [So please respond today with your most generous contribution.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SSdsl5&mc=9I&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=Eza59wg&) [I know I can count on you, Peter.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SSdsl5&mc=9I&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EB259k1&) _For America,_ \- John P.S. _My original message to you with more details is below..._
---|---

* * *
| | |
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Dear Peter, Last month I shared with you that even though he dropped out of the presidential race... [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SSdsl5&mc=9I&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EFnGCW7&) ..."Mini Mike" Bloomberg is still committed to spending $2 BILLION to defeat President Trump this Election! **And he just kicked off that promise by dumping**$18,000,000** into the Democratic National Committee's coffers for the express purpose of **DESTROYING** President Trump.** As I told you, the Democrats and Bloomberg are targeting key swing states where just a few percentage points in the wrong direction will spell President Trump's -- _and other good Conservatives'_ \-- defeat. But little do they know that we've been airing our highly-effective, issues-based radio ads directly to Black and Minority voters in those same battleground states _since August_. **But in order to keep our hard-hitting radio ads ON THE AIR in minority neighborhoods throughout these CRITICAL battleground states,_we MUST raise $16,280 each month_!** That's the price to keep these ads up-and-running for one entire month in Alabama, California, Iowa, Maine, Michigan, Minnesota and New Mexico --- _all carefully selected for high percentage of minority voters, a battleground state, and/or to defeat a radical socialist who hates America_! Peter, if we're going to win in November... WE MUST STAY ON THE AIR AND EXPAND INTO OTHER BATTLEGROUND STATES IMMEDIATELY! And we need your help to FIGHT BACK against Bloomberg and the Democrats --- and give President Trump four more years to Make America Great Again. name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Our new COVID-19 Resource Center
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b442b4d9b5c3/calling-all-patriots-12298694?e=795c6d9796)
---
| |
---
| | Peter, [I wanted to let you know that we're launching a new web page focused solely on keeping you informed on the Coronavirus](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=644ef9035a&e=795c6d9796). With all the challenges surrounding the Coronavirus pandemic, we try to remember that life is about serving others. So here are a few ways that you can help out locally during the outbreak. **[Please share this page with your friends and check back regularly for updates.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=12d2a310f4&e=795c6d9796)** Needless to say, please continue to follow the critically important social distancing practices, wash your hands, and don’t touch your face. **DONATE BLOOD** Blood is always in high demand, but the combination of social isolating and quarantining — along with increased admissions to hospitals — means that a severe shortage could be possible. Generally, healthy people of all ages can give blood, but please check the Oklahoma Blood Institute website to see if you qualify.

**[Here’s a link to the Oklahoma Blood Institute.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=70dfdb8222&e=795c6d9796)** You can also give them a call at 877-340-8777. **DON’T HOARD** If you’re tired of your grocery stores and pharmacies consistently being out of toilet paper, spread the word that they will restock! Only buy what you need. Remember — there are others who need supplies as well. **C****HECK ON ELDERLY** Give your mom, dad, aunt, uncle, grandma or grandpa a call. This virus affects us all, but it’s hitting especially hard with those 60 and up. Ask them if they need any shopping done and drop off some supplies to their door. At a time when isolation is encouraged, communicating and fostering a sense of community is more important than ever. Even if they’re not infected with COVID-19, they would probably enjoy some company to talk with. **DELIVER FOOD** Whether they have come in contact with someone who has been infected or are even recovering from it themselves, they would probably appreciate a food delivery. Let them know in advance that you are coming, ring the doorbell and place the food outside; leave before they open the door. [**Here’s a great site to make it easier for you to support local businesses**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=12f6b0a2ba&e=795c6d9796)**. **Oklahomans helping Oklahomans! **FOOD BANKS** With all the panicked stockpiling taking place, your local food pantries are struggling more than ever. Next time you’re at the grocery store, consider purchasing some additional products for your local food bank or homeless shelter; and it’s not just food that they need – they need essentials like toilet paper and hand soap, too. **[Click here for a link to the Regional Food Bank of Oklahoma.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=1c26131f47&e=795c6d9796)** *** _“Now he who supplies seed to the sower and bread for food will also supply and increase your store of seed and will enlarge the harvest of your righteousness.” _–2 Corinthians 9:10 Continuing to daily lift you up in prayer.

Best,
\--Janet Barresi
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Janet for CongressPO Box 20147Oklahoma City, OK 73156-0147
[Add us to your address book](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=54eeb9df14)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=54eeb9df14&e=795c6d9796) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=54eeb9df14&e=795c6d9796&c=f4a4c22de6).

name: Team Warner
subject: Sen. Warner's online town hall TOMORROW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Coronavirus is front of mind for folks these days, especially following Gov. Northam's decision to issue a stay at home order for Virginians.
|
---
| | Derek --

Coronavirus is front of mind for folks these days, especially following Gov. Northam's decision to issue a stay-at-home order for Virginians. Just because we're physically distancing doesn't mean we can't talk to one another -- or our elected officials.

That's why Senator Mark Warner is holding a Facebook Live Town Hall on **Thursday, April 2, 2020.** There, he'll answer your questions and talk about what he's been working on in the Senate to protect all Virginians during this outbreak. Here are the details: | **Facebook Live Town Hall with Senator Mark Warner**
Thursday, April 2, 2020
5:15 PM ET
**[Click here to RSVP](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d529/53d9897e/5321064e/1c899d36/137536966/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/265532/")**
---
If you already have a question for Mark, you can ask it when you register for the event. He's looking forward to making sure that all of his constituents have the information and resources they need in this uncertain time.

We hope you'll join us on Thursday! **[Click here to sign up.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d529/53d9897e/5321064e/1c899d36/137536966/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/265532/")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d529/53d9897e/5321064e/1c899d35/137536966/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com") Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d529/53d9897e/5321064e/1c899d34/137536966/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Team Cotton
subject: The Warning Signs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
While Democrats in Washington were distracted by a ridiculous impeachment trial for President Trump, Tom was raising the alarm on the growing threat of the China Virus.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42162852&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDExNTk2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

While Democrats in Washington were distracted by a ridiculous impeachment trial for President Trump, Tom was raising the alarm on the growing threat of the China Virus.

Check out the [article](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDIxNjI4NTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDExNTk2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) below from National Review for more on Tom's important work.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIxNjI4NTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDExNTk2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_
While others slept, Tom Cotton was warning anyone who would listen that the coronavirus was coming for America.

On January 22, one day before the Chinese government began a quarantine of Wuhan to contain the spread of the virus, the Arkansas senator sent a letter to Secretary of Health and Human Services Alex Azar encouraging the Trump administration to consider banning travel between China and the United States and warning that the Communist regime could be covering up how dangerous the disease really was. That same day, he amplified his warnings on Twitter and in an appearance on the radio program of Fox & Friends host Brian Kilmeade.

At the time, the Senate impeachment trial was dominating the news cycle. The trial, which lasted from January 16 to February 5, had even blotted out coverage of the Democratic presidential primary in the days leading up to the Iowa caucuses. When the first classified briefing on the virus was held in the Senate on January 24, only 14 senators reportedly showed up.

Cotton's public and private warnings became more urgent that last week of January. In a January 28 letter to the secretaries of state, health and human services, and homeland security, he noted that "no amount of screening [at airports] will identify a contagious-but-asymptomatic person afflicted with the coronavirus" and called for an immediate evacuation of Americans in China and a ban on all commercial flights between China and the United States.

Cotton first spoke to President Trump about the virus the next day. The Arkansas Gazette reported that he missed nearly three hours of the impeachment trial while he was discussing the matter with Trump-administration officials. The outbreak was "the biggest and the most important story in the world," he said in a Senate hearing that week.

What tipped the senator off to the true nature of the threat? Why was he the first and the loudest voice in Congress to sound the alarm about the looming pandemic?

In an interview with National Review, Cotton is quick to point out that he doesn't have a background in science or public health, but he does have two eyes. As a long-time China hawk, he found his interest piqued early on by reports "primarily from East Asian news sources."

"Two things struck me about China's response," he says. "First their deceit and their dishonesty going back to early December. And second, the extreme draconian measures they had taken. By the third week of January, they had more than 75 million people on lockdown. They were confined to their homes and apartments, otherwise they were arrested. In some cases, the front doors of those buildings were welded shut. All schools had shut down. Hong Kong had banned flights from the mainland. [These are] the kind of extreme, draconian measures that you would only take in a position of power in China if you were greatly worried about the spread of this virus."

On January 31, the president announced a ban on entry to foreign travelers who had been in China in the previous two weeks, while allowing Americans and permanent residents to continue to travel back and forth between the two countries. The measure was not as stringent as Cotton's call for a ban on all commercial flights, but Cotton points out that the president "did not have many advisers encouraging him to shut down travel." Advisers who were supportive tended to be national-security aides, he adds, while "most of his economic and public-health advisers were ambivalent at best about the travel ban."

"I commend the president greatly for ultimately making the right decision contrary to what the so-called experts were telling him," he says.

Of course, while the travel restriction may have bought the United States time, that time was largely squandered by the catastrophic failure of the CDC and FDA to ramp up testing for the coronavirus in the United States.

In phone calls and meetings in early February, Cotton says, he encouraged the administration "to be very aggressive and very flexible when it came to testing and diagnostic protocols. One consistent thing I had seen in the literature from past outbreaks is that the FDA and especially the CDC is unfortunately somewhat slow to act in these circumstances."

"I did discuss that with the president," Cotton adds. "I discussed it with Jared Kushner. I discussed it a lot with Robert O'Brien, the national-security adviser," and O'Brien's deputy, Matthew Pottinger.

"The CDC should not have acted like know-it-all bureaucrats who had the only medical and scientific expertise to develop tests. We have lots and lots of very capable labs all around the country," Cotton says. "The FDA should not put all of its eggs in the CDC basket. . . . They were slow to use their emergency-use authorization." In a January 26 appearance on Face the Nation, Cotton called on the FDA to expedite approval for testing to state and local governments.

"The bureaucracy just didn't move as fast as it could have," he says. "Dr. Fauci said it's not the president's fault. It would have happened to any other president. But it was a lost opportunity, given the time the president bought everyone with the travel [restriction]."

Does the president ultimately bear responsibility for the failures at the CDC and FDA? "He is the president, and it's always the president's job to push the bureaucracy when they're moving too slowly," Cotton says. "But sometimes you have to push very, very hard."

Where are we now and where do we go from here in the fight against the coronavirus? "You can't have a virus rampaging through society and expect the economy to open up, but you can't have economic collapse and expect our health-care system to continue to work," Cotton says. "You have to get the virus under control before you gradually start reopening things like white-collar work and manufacturing capacity and low-density retail and ultimately high-density retail."

The things the country must focus on over the next few weeks, he says, are building up production capacity for "rapid testing, respirator masks, [and] thermometer guns," getting "personnel trained on contact tracing," and developing "procedures and even laws at the local level for individual mandatory quarantines" for those infected with the virus.

Cotton notes that there is still a lot that's unclear about the virus: It could be far more infectious with a lower fatality rate than has been reported for instance. But then again, "They don't turn the Javits Center into a field hospital for the flu. They don't bring in ice trucks to back up the morgue for the flu."

"Using your own two eyes to see what's happening in our hospitals," Cotton says, is "the real acid-test for how serious this virus is."_
__

| Paid for by Cotton for Senate
---

2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

_Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch._

[Privacy Policy](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDIxNjI4NTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDExNTk2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42162852&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDExNTk2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Cotton notes that there is still a lot that's unclear about the virus: It could be far more infectious with a lower fatality rate than has been reported for instance. But then again, "They don't turn the Javits Center into a field hospital for the flu. They don't bring in ice trucks to back up the morgue for the flu." "Using your own two eyes to see what's happening in our hospitals," Cotton says, is "the real acid-test for how serious this virus is." | Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane Suite 200 Little Rock, AR 72202 Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: What we accomplished in March
body:
I wanted to give an update to all of my friends and supporters

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/7e0032a3c126/what-we-accomplished-in-february-3862157?e=140a9b81e7)

** What a wild, long month that was.
------------------------------------------------------------
March was without a doubt a long, hard month that presented some unique challenges for our campaign, but it was still a huge success!

In the last month, we have...
* Contacted over 3,800 voters through phonebanking and canvassing! Every voter we contact gets us one vote closer to our goal. You can help during this time of social distancing by signing up to volunteer here (https://www.daniforillinois.com/get-involved) if you haven't already!
* Received more donations than any previous month. In March, we received contributions from over 350 individuals, and the vast majority chipped in more than once. Thank you all for your support!
* Held a successful Facebook Live Town Hall. Even as we all shelter in place, it is still vital that we make sure we communicate with as many voters as we can. Watch the town hall here (https://www.facebook.com/DaniForCongress/videos/277754239891331/?__xts__[0]=68.ARAmbHEbjPFWmaYVV_GSSjH6yDSm2tcL-2cWbDM4xVDqpnLQXn776yXZ6Vgfi-ayMbIga4qSZ9xiShulcC-ROQoLTVGNVtUrATqFPaDA9SQMr5XPAPdbbuQgqexXwhJifKa-wEcyudgm-L4_4OL3pFaJCkeo-sUBXg-LKo-DB04IvM0o44vVU79HFXLFNvZM6HzPDCHbb-6yfHFGxxKLAe0-GxAt8G0DzLdxAa2e5clPx1HTECryRkdrlRUfYgyNbdQBra7gfMMLe7csuNmVmxqJ5emmMonKyu0tHLn_2EIWK-ke2Jy5LoUNxKMY3zmkoO2bEgxmK7jgtjoeN9XSEot3hI5aFVPGjRY&__tn__=-R) !

Everything that we achieve on this campaign is thanks to the support of grassroots supporters like you. I cannot thank you enough for the investment you have made in our race to flip IL 16.

One last thing; stay safe out there. I know that this is a trying time for everybody as we deal with COVID-19. Let's get through this together.

Dani Brzozowski

============================================================
** Chip in again (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/daniforillinoiswebsitepopup)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/daniforcongress)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/daniforcongress)
** Website (daniforillinois.com )

Our mailing address is:
Dani for Illinois
PO Box 1671
LaSalle, IL 61301

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7369c912a5&e=140a9b81e7)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7369c912a5&e=140a9b81e7&c=06f51bafa0)

name: First Lady Janet Holcomb
subject: my favorite parks in Indiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Henry and I are huge fans of our state parks — that’s why the Holcomb Crew let me take over One Indiana this week! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a5e034584ec4445ac5eba4d5a70a8af&_e=UYPStSczVGlNc-AqQUmhwdYXb3wFmyYsMZuYgjOIy5junKQJhR5x8MbwuMldgWRD6wqfUwXIGUskwqnAwxEMcnko6M4vgWe1dmyyIeDOMdvsYwWhIptrqS-qr-PMe-Dp1NF7K4ILoVK7Vwst5XnCLJ0eG_Od7t4o1ouXcIXkiw746fEmwYQz5oHsjONMZNcpNnVTX-CHvaoKXuK5gCe3Xk2bMR3OOd_I_OHrg19ZRt6AQVsz9BSgpswh8V0Nfp_o-y7huQFxEu7cpce7cahLELJ-ogdDpWShHMvbkumaqmpnmv2wHgKefogGRCaE27BXpzhRFG8KM8WaMUW4HKGJS_evNkDtzu7FywcB1Mn6WPtsKzqo0jRP3rOtNsXlYFN20jyEDhJd_TY6veIBAcSEjm6ocIOqi7u9uGb_GKy0S6E%3D) Friend,

**We’ve got a long road ahead of us, but we’re all in this together. **
Eric and I have been telling Hoosiers how important it is to hunker down at home to keep your loved ones safe and healthy. It’s more vital than ever to practice social distancing — working together to save Hoosier lives.
_And it’s also critical to get outside and stay physically — and mentally — healthy. _
**Here’s the good news — Indiana’s state parks are some of the BEST in the country, they’re still open, and right now they are all currently waiving their entrance fees!** Depending on the park, some of the areas will be closed to visitors, but you can still get outside for a hike! **There’s lots of space at our state parks...and plenty of room to get out while still social distancing.**
Henry and I are huge fans of our state parks — that’s why the Holcomb Crew let me take over One Indiana this week! I compiled a list of my favorite Indiana State Parks to give you a few ideas about how to stay active and safe during this time when we’re hunkered down.
Check them out below! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a5e034584ec4445ac5eba4d5a70a8af&_e=UYPStSczVGlNc-AqQUmhwdYXb3wFmyYsMZuYgjOIy5junKQJhR5x8MbwuMldgWRD6wqfUwXIGUskwqnAwxEMcnko6M4vgWe1dmyyIeDOMdvsYwWhIptrqS-qr-PMe-Dp1NF7K4ILoVK7Vwst5XnCLJ0eG_Od7t4o1ouXcIXkiw746fEmwYQz5oHsjONMZNcpNnVTX-CHvaoKXuK5gCe3XpLL7ANCXolQF7I9ZA4o38AqVfRyTAY0irBE9dSdko_4o8bgGWlLCoDTSPo98JtD83oOBIiBw6aeQ2XVXzT3SxCHtjtfYl00D_p3XAqISY7WYSLCgwrDUVsIvOOSqc2zPBddaSWvW349yBw7bhWisl5qtpRAgUFGblbigz7hYmg2fvM1172FeKHEAJ74VOxgdlvvKsc7SDCLEDvyvifBAlM%3D)
* **[Brown County](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a5e034584ec4445ac5eba4d5a70a8af&_e=UYPStSczVGlNc-AqQUmhwRqdpNkwMXo_RdGqSb3WZVu8jdaIBMHzVhWZjR2ze-gLHlQYJnjSKbSmpxbch9b2s_MAUtOGURMVceR2X1uFrcA2GNTziI_OzwDeAO8taqvkUGRkI9zqbF3_UAivsjqSLKRrB2ob49P259lefRdsYbrN07qWj1_lQ-CvGtlkjmpRaBUF4NnICXhPlKqJqZcomZsdvnwoUkOJIsWRWRKMONG-R3FzQFDFe47XO84pl_3LRnoy7FJPkuOYoyIC00-grQ-wk7MR7_fnbEf-fQs9_Nr2a_-e961TmZLqdrE5omaK_B7gGK34NIe8DHE2skP8W9ZXCfpSC1LZrd_1g1X2Jh2Nfp9lgERD0vc2R37v1HK9iut13wupgzr89TNNlskAyA%3D%3D)** \- the largest park in our state — that means there’s lots of room for you to get outside!
* [**Falls of the Ohio**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a5e034584ec4445ac5eba4d5a70a8af&_e=UYPStSczVGlNc-AqQUmhwdSWcFYFFBqr7uxmKiRZPgnxUMlQ-yvn5_BgIxDbGJXXhtT1GGzAVNVIyEufIBuIbfDNhuVBsGVZhneGyocNAO-cWW1jV-QbcrXUXK5GBcODVa7RoBZQjBQdNntjviqO6AuVhl1QREDfU5J4NpO1gO9b1ptSfAFsJv59l3qs_55a0wqcZDxHOegsqNVWExvHR30Q0uSw9_qB0YhJhkzPU6KKitwkTGcRHinhEn7kf0po_2wSvzjS1zhPzs2Lq4vIUiKc_d83OLorvj89my3mWLsAntZUrowPkCz4xN79VIPv7K2oEOl-E3yJ6Xm2SyxqwS0DBlAgV0twzSZxZQrPfZWcc1WZljohOLeE6loWbcutnJEmfSorwovIw5Sl_C94xw%3D%3D) (Clark County) - you can combine a little history with your outdoor adventure at this beautiful park, where Lewis and Clark launched their famous expedition.
* **[Indiana Dunes](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a5e034584ec4445ac5eba4d5a70a8af&_e=UYPStSczVGlNc-AqQUmhwRqdpNkwMXo_RdGqSb3WZVulsHKaBgg_zmyPZMr0FCCXUkKxP3vwEef_3Ck9YusyL4BUjjpjkSvkIIeO-Jo3KOCRKir007xsjpKk-WUAVW3ULgaJio7KvLOk0QyiYPkDAhBJvaiO5qDIsueoto7pqo0QwEqr1Jad6WmVu4ZN7KmgFbaIY5--yigvoO_4tMj_-tqnY46KjgImEsPJEhaMJfPqe9Tjf56I8WJTyhSOz-I7oAcZVdVxOet29nWWYjUY-jnqM3CpPyHO1AMy4ymptCFnS22Ca3B2N41EdpDWWrBh9fI8SCAN-LtTy5c1APccHxjKRATmCf1rKNMWa9Pl7O8B1HH56i_KZmns0G-0ILNj14ELvt1SLQttSPdR4FlqbQ%3D%3D)** (Porter County) - you can always go for a hike in the most visited attraction in Indiana (Indiana Dunes State Park is adjacent to our newest national park!)
* **[Fort Harrison](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a5e034584ec4445ac5eba4d5a70a8af&_e=UYPStSczVGlNc-AqQUmhwRqdpNkwMXo_RdGqSb3WZVvxgejK4BoUskaVaAOsszl85pZmAprk0pBp_k9irdwESlRXC9BMW205HhPidrABBL4c75Frdeagm5FlrmwB85ec5j39nPEqQIFKuTgaNSKicG2tRFfzDQL_wxccKcAYcR1BQb7_918tn5ZZUtMmfpPmzLzZA7b_ywkpg3B0fAYvl9Kzv7LNDgZnJN7EvVcEXeyozRLEqA7XPumhgwsN3relKBRmGPRY-cjTgH-K3sEeszaspi0P51PZugisO_mBx5SvO-JJGtL4H2Xzfwkc-pdiuvZbv0lxJR42uQ2R3Vae2bhN3hhOvMBNrT3VdIaC9z-SXpHsmfdVQB6FcqBirPnuq4jRco__PAwqhRCXzqeanw%3D%3D)** (Marion County) - 1,700 acres of Hoosier history, beautiful scenery, and outdoor activities!
* **[McCormick’s Creek](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a5e034584ec4445ac5eba4d5a70a8af&_e=UYPStSczVGlNc-AqQUmhwRqdpNkwMXo_RdGqSb3WZVuhmR3mibAMlvicyJMjPahYkq-z_qSsR0vp5EYAmLGfGv6JzwjfveYDbD33swcL2raHdx8HEXT5QKCArC7dxYrbwAB98gSl0Cx8Jdsp5ZYWv_HwiMCLsnkRhTd4QFw87m2tC9LN7lhzyYAoOJfPk0kRP64Dw_vnn14hDhhkAjDTFZeiBzEwVL_vwOX5kHXW_C7YTW0nFLwhWVUjU5oe2mdoQQUs2YCCeO9u9S7H0vaATzBGOIbKL7vdMS1tqxi15ogk_jn-_3ytzxQXecJK0pJEvO9U7HyNydf_fcH1ym_Xwf3ZZgXPFPmGpW-WQASfOdT3kGvJr-QuG7zneyXKabDlUXOoCMPxCr7E1OcdLK-X7w%3D%3D)** (Owen County) - The original! Indiana’s first state park is always worth visiting.
* **[Turkey Run](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a5e034584ec4445ac5eba4d5a70a8af&_e=UYPStSczVGlNc-AqQUmhwRqdpNkwMXo_RdGqSb3WZVvWw5H_eGWexzGiZzKawl4EXY5RuQamAB1mcn_fsML60huVTo2dLPGhNpKJm04CeO03PShM7iV0Rdz2UN_nLFAzV_myal34XAxgy7BKJCIWEDwTNZLB1BH93diZ-g0vTuuLl6q17fLnc7gzdVqBn_yfHauZKer1gTg4FS3uZoxy1gULeGc1eqXrUD_h-MYg9ImG4E-ocCwpZOjpZuSdod_u6LCQiVBTqOyE1rp_7-dkumCZAmOl66X-6aFtW71Woh3TULO4o2PsQsZHf7Z0ykKpAeD5n6MT1MCViaeez9qrQFhyRv0eJ94qgdpGKQSOSSOoKJgMiJs1eXJOowaCP01iFNXvGwAjrlmzOTvWLYW2UQ%3D%3D)** (Parke County) - the beautiful canyons and gorges of Turkey Run are a great place for a hike!
* **[Clifty Falls](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a5e034584ec4445ac5eba4d5a70a8af&_e=UYPStSczVGlNc-AqQUmhwRqdpNkwMXo_RdGqSb3WZVvzS7sLpeNHWYWV0dJ1u36sjOGUhZIQqwt3MrqNZj1QA_TwhT-pkfVyj9j3LQ2IHXotum2WAxT-g_oNP2bxHNp-t-Ojd4S8VcmjCtsSfKf9pyIYisWrpMA2Gm_dA_L1evIfwQ1h4Gzd4Xy1nfYtqV4TMdVQGkCIDpPlwR-V3QJJavCS9knGq5BcB5Kgs_sviavGlJmyPlo1HjUReOif4H2u1p2rjOA5a-Gi6r0SGGuC_xupyvbrA_0B8S4E_Pm4ElG-eJdt_1Hi_GF31oE2TTHaDGAl9rWN9Trnhs-YNDfR_PqR29dmDhRsDmtTs24-TNw_C4vpLbf7a8r5t4x0r85OUKagTYKz6onPnXonIKKXUA%3D%3D)** (Jefferson County) - this beautiful park is right on the Ohio River and contains majestic waterfalls that change based on the season.
* **[Chain O’Lakes](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a5e034584ec4445ac5eba4d5a70a8af&_e=UYPStSczVGlNc-AqQUmhwRqdpNkwMXo_RdGqSb3WZVtCiOsNFbqKmD_r7mZrjiu_mUUPCL9O1--Z325rb-1-VCaydta65IejI42BjItrT28xs3QtAMOoG1385Y23d7nqFnil-MN0J3-YEDVtnlvhQaWBsy8wvKw29sH2vkTGCA98Zy6BWNe2XKRrZX4P7kqzVLv81EZoz7YXTHHEFax0dz7INcanAoHr90hW-KN0uiYaUB5xX8McjAmSdjzpnM7oHNSxQJpFD2zqUfrSwo22DpZRg04-oiMLIoQqC-3aUzRKvpJQ57p9ddHO4UkcbX60LL1KtD16K3Y0qwAb7Bq2olNE6jXvKhxxYzSdWIQyhApLTnJG2yRZoGvp_LMmXXpbQUDXjKOEcZ69QtOa8AI8Ww%3D%3D)** (Noble County) - home to nine connected lakes, Chain O’Lakes is a great place to get in touch with nature and explore Indiana’s natural beauty.

Here’s the catch — if you visit any of our state parks, you need to make sure you’re following ALL social distancing guidelines, no excuses. **So I’m asking you to add your name below and pledge to follow these guidelines.** [ **Sign Our Social Distancing Pledge** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a5e034584ec4445ac5eba4d5a70a8af&_e=UYPStSczVGlNc-AqQUmhwdYXb3wFmyYsMZuYgjOIy5junKQJhR5x8MbwuMldgWRD6wqfUwXIGUskwqnAwxEMcnko6M4vgWe1dmyyIeDOMdvsYwWhIptrqS-qr-PMe-Dp1NF7K4ILoVK7Vwst5XnCLJ0eG_Od7t4o1ouXcIXkiw746fEmwYQz5oHsjONMZNcpNnVTX-CHvaoKXuK5gCe3XkNnyeFQPJ7U2SR6xq7aI0USkYbtBZ9H2Pym74IvTHxHsnksZ7c7JLiwXPiEE0VkEH8Emjsr7fH6vhfGFAhdM0izDmdu9030Ni9qB-iFc7tGG0k_WgbTHFyGJW6zCzvLTiVbnorUUXuU7ZfcUAC7pWvAyKuPpYTlajlzTQyfPacj0-zKD6P6M0IiaWSXKmFvMfjCYJmCKKgsQkB3bPQBCGA%3D) Thank you for reading — please continue to hunker down and stay healthy. **We’re all in this together. ** Stay Strong, Janet Holcomb |
